text: Good morning everybody. Today feels like a holiday because it is my perfect day. So last night I
did not set an alarm and I allowed myself to sleep in a little bit this morning. It felt so nice
sleeping in. Since it's my perfect day, I'm going to show you some of my favorite things to do,
some of my favorite things to eat and see, and just spend the day doing things that I really
enjoy. Unfortunately, Mother Nature did not get the memo that it was my perfect day because on my
perfect day, it would not rain, but it is so rainy outside right now. But that's okay, I'll make the
best of it. To start the day off, I'm going to do yoga, which is my favorite exercise. I do it
every morning and it's something I look forward to in the morning. Let's get moving. I'm on my yoga
mat and I've got my laptop set up in front of me because I've been doing a 90 day yoga challenge on
YouTube. I just finished my workout and now I'm going to do a few chores. My mind is so much more
at ease and at peace when I have a clean house. So even though I hate doing chores,
I will feel so much better afterwards. I worked out, the house is super clean, I showered and got
ready, and I even snuck in a little bit of work. I had a peaceful but productive morning. But now
I'm feeling a little bit antsy because I haven't gone outside once yet today and it's already
noon. So I think I'm going to take myself out on a little breakfast or I guess at this point
brunch date. The rain isn't actually too bad right now. It's just like a light drizzle but I'm on my
way to the original pancake house. I'm a sucker for American style breakfast and it's such comfort
food for me. I also love that the interior of the restaurant is kind of like a classic diner.
It makes me feel very nostalgic so I'm excited to go eat some pancakes. I'm out of breath because
I ran to catch this bus. I did not want to get stuck in the rain. Luckily the driver was so sweet
and waited for me to catch up. Thank you. I made it to the pancake house. It really makes me think
of home. Look at how many different kinds of pancakes they have. Crazy. I love that you can get
your eggs cooked in many different ways here. It's so specific. I personally usually like over
easy eggs. Can I get the ever popular jaw? Can I have just a little bit of cheese? True to American
diner style. They serve bottomless coffee. I love it. I take my coffee black because I like it a
little bit bitter. It's perfect on a rainy day. The ever popular Joe is my go-to meal at this
restaurant. I love it because there are savory eggs and sweet pancakes so you get the best of
both worlds. It's funny because even the portion sizes here remind me of home. They give you
so much food. I also love that they give you so many condiments. They have maple syrup, hot sauce,
ketchup, any kind of condiment or sauce that you would need. Let's try the pancakes first. I prefer
classic pancakes with lots of maple syrup. The pancakes are so fluffy. I like a little bit of
Tabasco sauce on my eggs.
I feel like my perfect day is finally beginning.
Brunch was fantastic and it definitely hit the spot. I was careful not to over-indulge too much
so I've got leftovers. This will be perfect for breakfast tomorrow. On my perfect day usually I would
go for a long walk outside but since the weather is kind of bad today and it's been raining on and off

a lot of false sense like apple pie and pumpkin and all kinds of cozy sense so I want to buy a candle

I'm at Bath & Body Works and I might treat myself to a candle. I want this kind of scent

There's a great selection and some of them I even recognize from when I was younger. Books I

out in my favor today. It's almost comical. A perfect day for me would be warm and sunny and I would
spend the majority of my day outside biking going on a picnic but today I've mostly been indoors.
It's so rainy and it's making my hair frizzy and it is just chaotic going outside. My umbrella broke
and people kept bumping into me with their umbrellas so it just kind of made me laugh because it's

and I'm excited for tonight because I'm gonna meet up with a friend. Until then I'll just stay
home. I'll read a little bit, work a little bit and just relax until I see my friend.
